questions.question: Describe the order in which a Depth First Search algorithm explores the nodes of a graph. What happens if the graph contains a cycle? In your answer, include the benefits of using DFS for solving certain types of problems.
questions.hint: Use the graph below to illustrate your answer.

questions.question: Consider a graph with the following nodes and edges: A -> B, A -> C, B -> D, C -> D, D -> E. Write a Depth First Search algorithm to find all the connected components in this graph.
questions.hint: Show your code and explain how it works.

questions.question: A graph has 10 nodes and 15 edges, representing a tree. Write a Depth First Search algorithm to find the path from the root node to all the other nodes in the tree.
questions.hint: Use a recursive approach to solve this problem.
